ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND($Setup.Disable_Metadata_Settings__c.Disable_Product_Validation_WF__c == false ,AND ( (RecordType.DeveloperName='Distressed_Account'), OR( ( AND(ISNEW(),ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , "For Review") && ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c , ""))), ( AND (ISCHANGED(Refer_to_Legal__c),(ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , "For Review") && ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c , "")))), ( AND (ISCHANGED(Refer_to_Legal__c),(ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , "Approved") && ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c , "")))), ( AND (ISCHANGED(Refer_to_Legal__c),(ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , "Declined") && ISPICKVAL(Reason_for_Legal__c , "")))), ( AND (ISCHANGED(Reason_for_Legal__c),(ISPICKVAL(Refer_to_Legal__c , " ")))) ) ))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Reason for legal should not be blank
